frame_analyses.description: Pelvitrainer setup visible with needle drivers positioned, suture material present
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial setup appears standard for extracorporeal suture task

frame_analyses.description: Needle drivers manipulating suture, double loop configuration visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture appears to be forming extracorporeal knot structure

frame_analyses.description: Double loop structure maintained, instruments working to form extracorporeal knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper double loop technique being demonstrated

frame_analyses.description: Caption indicates 'doppelte Schlinge hält nicht' (double loop doesn't hold)
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears to be slipping or not maintaining proper tension

frame_analyses.description: Caption shows 'darüber eine einfache, gegenläufige Schlinge' (over it a simple, counter-running loop)
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Attempting to secure with additional loop in opposite direction

frame_analyses.description: Caption 'Rutschknoten schieben' (push slip knot), knot pusher being used
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot pusher being employed to advance knot down to tissue

frame_analyses.description: Caption continues 'Rutschknoten durch Zug wieder in chir. Knoten verwandeln' (convert slip knot back to surgical knot by pulling)
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Attempting to convert slip knot to secure surgical knot

frame_analyses.description: Caption shows 'klick' and 'hält' (holds), suggesting successful knot seating
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears to have seated properly at target location

frame_analyses.description: Scissors visible, preparing to cut suture tails
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final phase of cutting suture ends after knot completion

penalties.description: Initial double loop failed to hold as indicated by German caption

knot_assessment.notes: Initial double loop slipped but was successfully converted to secure surgical knot

confidence_rationale: Task completion and timing clearly visible. Knot slippage explicitly noted in German captions. Cannot assess suture placement accuracy relative to marks due to camera angle and video quality.
cannot_determine: Exact deviation from target marks on Penrose drain - marks not clearly visible in video frames
Precise gap assessment in drain - insufficient resolution to measure millimeter gaps
technique_summary: Competent intermediate performance with successful extracorporeal knot completion despite initial slippage. Good recovery technique converting slip knot to secure surgical knot. Total time of 70 seconds falls within expert-intermediate range.
strengths: Successful recovery from initial knot slippage
Proper use of knot pusher technique
improvement_suggestions: Focus on proper initial loop tension to prevent slippage
Practice consistent double loop technique to avoid need for corrective maneuvers
